description: Sun Yee On is one of the leading triads in Hong Kong and China, founded in 1919 by Heung Chin. It has over 25,000 members worldwide and is active in multiple countries including the UK, US, France, and Belgium. The triad is involved in racketeering, counterfeiting, extortion, drug trafficking, money laundering, murder, and illegal gambling. It remains active as of the present day.

country_links.evidence_quote: Territory: Chaozhou , Mainland China , Hong Kong , Mainland China , Japan, France, South Africa, United Kingdom, India, Thailand, Korea, Colombia, Canada, United States, Australia, Central America
country_links.context: Sun Yee On has territory in Australia.

country_links.evidence_quote: It is also believed to be active in the UK, the United States, France, and Belgium.
